title: FrenchVocabularyLesson
description: A schema for a French vocabulary lesson.

title.description: The title of the vocabulary lesson in English.

vocabularies.description: A list of French vocabulary words.

englishTranslation.description: The English translation of the word.

lemma.description: The base form (lemma) of the word in French.

pluralForm.description: The plural form of the word, if applicable.
